reviews.review_description:
Echo Drift Demo is a solid VR racing experience set in a dystopian world where tires are a thing of the past, allowing for wild, gravity-defying drifts.

The gameplay is fast-paced, fun, and backed by solid customization options that make each race feel rewarding. MoonShine Games is already a reputable studio (they previously made the very fun TOT Racing – Tree or Trophy), and their experience clearly shows here.

This early-access demo already delivers a strong foundation and feels like a promising step forward for the VR racing genre. Definitely one to keep an eye on.

Free demo, give it a shot!
